query: Diagnose why this Linux host's tail latency rose with high load average.
Find whether CPU, memory, disk, network, or locks constrain this process.
Investigate swapping and reclaim stalls under a stable workload.
Use BPF safely to isolate intermittent filesystem latency.
Explain and diagnose high iowait without guessing at disk tuning.
Attribute a Linux throughput regression to process, thread, cgroup, or device.
Design a reversible experiment for suspected scheduler contention.
Review these perf and flame-graph results for the actual bottleneck.
Investigate packet drops and retransmits on this Linux service.
Compare before/after host performance without averaging away tails.
Optimize this Python loop with cProfile output.
Tune this SQL query from EXPLAIN ANALYZE.
Explain the ls command.
Write a Bash script to rotate files.
Debug a wrong result in this algorithm.
Create an SLO for the whole service.
Configure one known sysctl exactly as specified.
Review a Linux kernel patch for security.
Build a Docker image.
Teach me virtual memory basics.
